text: Grace & Smales Mobility Index!® e Grade 0: No apparent mobility e Grade 1: Perceptible mobility <1mm in buccolingual direction e Grade 2: >1mm but <2mm e Grade 3: >2mm or depressibility in the socket Miller Classification!®! e Class 1: <1 mm (horizontal) e Class 2: > 1 mm (horizontal) e Class 3: > 1 mm (horizontal+vertical mobility)
